approval.note: Use an isolated Commonworld worktree. Before every nontrivial merge require complete published diff, head/tree/diff-bound self-review, green CI, review resolution and exact live Pages readback.

title: Grow a balanced catalog and add explicit Weltgewebe handoff
goal: Expand to a transparent, balanced and reviewable Commons catalog with explicit same-identity transitions to Weltgewebe.

acceptance.assertion: The catalog reaches 30–50 sourced entries without one institutional family dominating unnoticed.
Selection scope, geographic/digital coverage and known gaps are visible.
Candidate, review, stale and archive paths preserve activity/curation distinction.
A bounded candidate or partner contribution path exists without direct unreviewed publication.
Known shared identities link explicitly to Weltgewebe and back without implied login or write authority.
